steps.title: Close the parenthetical
steps.content: The sentence opens a parenthetical phrase with a left parenthesis before as many as 200,000. The blank comes at the end of that parenthetical phrase, so it must close the parenthesis before the sentence continues with in a complex of apartments.

steps.title: Avoid mismatched punctuation
steps.content: Choice B closes the parenthesis but adds an unnecessary comma before the essential prepositional phrase. Choice C tries to close a parenthesis with a dash, and Choice D leaves the parenthetical unclosed. The correct punctuation simply closes the parenthesis after estimates. The answer is A.
